app.name: extractalign
app.desc: Extract regions from a sequence alignment

app.name: cons
app.desc: Create a consensus sequence from a multiple alignment

app.name: consambig
app.desc: Create an ambiguous consensus sequence from a multiple alignment

app.name: megamerger
app.desc: Merge two large overlapping DNA sequences

app.name: merger
app.desc: Merge two overlapping sequences

app.name: diffseq
app.desc: Compare and report features of two similar sequences

app.name: dotmatcher
app.desc: Draw a threshold dotplot of two sequences

app.name: dotpath
app.desc: Draw a non-overlapping wordmatch dotplot of two sequences

app.name: dottup
app.desc: Display a wordmatch dotplot of two sequences

app.name: polydot
app.desc: Draw dotplots for all-against-all comparison of a sequence set

app.name: est2genome
app.desc: Align EST sequences to genomic DNA sequence

app.name: needle
app.desc: Needleman-Wunsch global alignment of two sequences

app.name: needleall
app.desc: Many-to-many pairwise alignments of two sequence sets

app.name: stretcher
app.desc: Needleman-Wunsch rapid global alignment of two sequences

app.name: matcher
app.desc: Waterman-Eggert local alignment of two sequences

app.name: seqmatchall
app.desc: All-against-all word comparison of a sequence set

app.name: supermatcher
app.desc: Calculate approximate local pair-wise alignments of larger sequences

app.name: water
app.desc: Smith-Waterman local alignment of sequences

app.name: wordfinder
app.desc: Match large sequences against one or more other sequences

app.name: wordmatch
app.desc: Find regions of identity (exact matches) of two sequences

app.name: edialign
app.desc: Local multiple alignment of sequences

app.name: emma
app.desc: Multiple sequence alignment (ClustalW wrapper)

app.name: infoalign
app.desc: Display basic information about a multiple sequence alignment

app.name: plotcon
app.desc: Plot conservation of a sequence alignment

app.name: prettyplot
app.desc: Draw a sequence alignment with pretty formatting

app.name: showalign
app.desc: Display a multiple sequence alignment in pretty format

app.name: tranalign
app.desc: Generate an alignment of nucleic coding regions from aligned proteins

app.name: cachedas
app.desc: Generate server cache file for DAS servers or for the DAS registry

app.name: cachedbfetch
app.desc: Generate server cache file for Dbfetch/WSDbfetch data sources

app.name: cacheebeyesearch
app.desc: Generate server cache file for EB-eye search domains

app.name: cacheensembl
app.desc: Generate server cache file for an Ensembl server

app.name: dbtell
app.desc: Display information about a public database

app.name: servertell
app.desc: Display information about a public server

app.name: showdb
app.desc: Display information on configured databases

app.name: showserver
app.desc: Display information on configured servers

app.name: codcopy
app.desc: Copy and reformat a codon usage table

app.name: seqret
app.desc: Read and write (return) sequences

app.name: infobase
app.desc: Return information on a given nucleotide base

app.name: inforesidue
app.desc: Return information on a given amino acid residue

app.name: featcopy
app.desc: Read and write a feature table

app.name: featmerge
app.desc: Merge two overlapping feature tables

app.name: edamdef
app.desc: Find EDAM ontology terms by definition

app.name: edamhasinput
app.desc: Find EDAM ontology terms by has_input relation

app.desc: Find EDAM ontology terms by is_format_of relation

app.desc: Find EDAM ontology terms by is_identifier_of relation

app.desc: Find EDAM ontology terms by name

app.desc: Find GO ontology terms by definition

app.name: goname
app.desc: Find GO ontology terms by name

app.desc: Get ontology term(s)

app.desc: Get ontology term(s) by parent id

app.desc: Get ontology ontology terms

app.desc: Get ontology root terms by child identifier

app.desc: Get ontology term(s) by id with common parent

app.desc: Get ontology term(s) by id of child

app.name: ontoisobsolete
app.desc: Report whether an ontology term id is obsolete

app.name: ontotext
app.desc: Get ontology term(s) original full text

app.name: drfindresource

app.desc: Get data resource entries

app.name: drtext
app.desc: Get data resource entries complete text

app.name: coderet
app.desc: Extract CDS, mRNA and translations from feature tables

app.name: entret
app.desc: Retrieve sequence entries from flatfile databases and files

app.name: extractalign
app.desc: Extract regions from a sequence alignment

app.name: infoalign
app.desc: Display basic information about a multiple sequence alignment

app.name: infoseq
app.desc: Display basic information about sequences

app.name: refseqget
app.desc: Get reference sequence

app.name: seqxref
app.desc: Retrieve all database cross-references for a sequence entry

app.name: seqxrefget
app.desc: Retrieve all cross-referenced data for a sequence entry

app.name: showalign
app.desc: Display a multiple sequence alignment in pretty format

app.name: whichdb
app.desc: Search all sequence databases for an entry and retrieve it

app.name: assemblyget
app.desc: Get assembly of sequence reads

app.name: infoassembly
app.desc: Display information about assemblies

app.name: drtext
app.desc: Get data resource entries complete text

app.name: entret
app.desc: Retrieve sequence entries from flatfile databases and files

app.name: ontotext
app.desc: Get ontology term(s) original full text

app.name: textget
app.desc: Get text data entries

app.name: textsearch
app.desc: Search the textual description of sequence(s)

app.name: cirdna
app.desc: Draw circular map of DNA constructs

app.name: iep
app.desc: Calculate the isoelectric point of proteins

app.name: lindna
app.desc: Draw linear maps of DNA constructs

app.name: pepinfo
app.desc: Plot amino acid properties of a protein sequence in parallel.

app.name: pepnet
app.desc: Draw a helical net for a protein sequence

app.name: pepwheel
app.desc: Draw a helical wheel diagram for a protein sequence

app.name: plotorf
app.desc: Plot potential open reading frames in a nucleotide sequence

app.name: prettyplot
app.desc: Draw a sequence alignment with pretty formatting

app.name: prettyseq
app.desc: Write a nucleotide sequence and its translation to file

app.name: remap
app.desc: Display restriction enzyme binding sites in a nucleotide sequence

app.name: showfeat
app.desc: Display features of a sequence in pretty format

app.name: showpep
app.desc: Display protein sequences with features in pretty format

app.name: sixpack
app.desc: Display a DNA sequence with 6-frame translation and ORFs

app.name: seealso
app.desc: Find programs with similar function to a specified program

app.name: tfm
app.desc: Display full documentation for an application

app.name: wossdata
app.desc: Find programs by EDAM data

app.name: wossinput
app.desc: Find programs by EDAM input data

app.name: wossname
app.desc: Find programs by keywords in their short description

app.name: wossoperation

app.desc: Find programs by EDAM output data

app.name: wossparam
app.desc: Find programs by EDAM parameter

app.name: wosstopic
app.desc: Find programs by EDAM topic

app.name: aligncopy
app.desc: Read and write alignments

app.name: aligncopypair
app.desc: Read and write pairs from alignments

app.name: biosed
app.desc: Replace or delete sequence sections

app.name: codcopy
app.desc: Copy and reformat a codon usage table

app.name: cutseq
app.desc: Remove a section from a sequence

app.name: degapseq
app.desc: Remove non-alphabetic (e.g. gap) characters from sequences

app.name: descseq
app.desc: Alter the name or description of a sequence.

app.name: entret
app.desc: Retrieve sequence entries from flatfile databases and files

app.name: extractalign
app.desc: Extract regions from a sequence alignment

app.name: extractfeat
app.desc: Extract features from sequence(s)

app.name: extractseq
app.desc: Extract regions from a sequence

app.name: featcopy
app.desc: Read and write a feature table

app.name: featmerge
app.desc: Merge two overlapping feature tables

app.name: featreport
app.desc: Read and write a feature table

app.name: feattext
app.desc: Return a feature table original text

app.name: listor
app.desc: Write a list file of the logical OR of two sets of sequences

app.name: makenucseq
app.desc: Create random nucleotide sequences

app.name: makeprotseq
app.desc: Create random protein sequences

app.name: maskambignuc
app.desc: Mask all ambiguity characters in nucleotide sequences with N

app.name: maskambigprot
app.desc: Mask all ambiguity characters in protein sequences with X

app.name: maskfeat
app.desc: Write a sequence with masked features

app.name: maskseq
app.desc: Write a sequence with masked regions

app.name: newseq
app.desc: Create a sequence file from a typed-in sequence

app.name: nohtml
app.desc: Remove mark-up (e.g. HTML tags) from an ASCII text file

app.name: noreturn
app.desc: Remove carriage return from ASCII files

app.name: nospace
app.desc: Remove whitespace from an ASCII text file

app.name: notab
app.desc: Replace tabs with spaces in an ASCII text file

app.name: notseq
app.desc: Write to file a subset of an input stream of sequences

app.name: nthseq
app.desc: Write to file a single sequence from an input stream of sequences

app.name: nthseqset
app.desc: Read and write (return) one set of sequences from many

app.name: pasteseq
app.desc: Insert one sequence into another

app.name: revseq
app.desc: Reverse and complement a nucleotide sequence

app.name: seqcount
app.desc: Read and count sequences

app.name: seqret
app.desc: Read and write (return) sequences

app.name: seqretsetall
app.desc: Read and write (return) many sets of sequences

app.name: sizeseq
app.desc: Sort sequences by size

app.name: skipredundant
app.desc: Remove redundant sequences from an input set

app.name: skipseq
app.desc: Read and write (return) sequences, skipping first few

app.name: splitsource
app.desc: Split sequence(s) into original source sequences

app.name: splitter
app.desc: Split sequence(s) into smaller sequences

app.name: trimest
app.desc: Remove poly-A tails from nucleotide sequences

app.name: trimseq
app.desc: Remove unwanted characters from start and end of sequence(s)

app.name: trimspace
app.desc: Remove extra whitespace from an ASCII text file

app.name: union
app.desc: Concatenate multiple sequences into a single sequence

app.name: vectorstrip
app.desc: Remove vectors from the ends of nucleotide sequence(s)

app.name: yank
app.desc: Add a sequence reference (a full USA) to a list file

app.name: findkm
app.desc: Calculate and plot enzyme reaction data

app.name: extractfeat
app.desc: Extract features from sequence(s)

app.name: maskfeat
app.desc: Write a sequence with masked features

app.name: showfeat
app.desc: Display features of a sequence in pretty format

app.name: twofeat
app.desc: Find neighbouring pairs of features in sequence(s)

app.name: banana
app.desc: Plot bending and curvature data for B-DNA

app.name: btwisted
app.desc: Calculate the twisting in a B-DNA sequence

app.name: einverted
app.desc: Find inverted repeats in nucleotide sequences

app.name: sirna
app.desc: Find siRNA duplexes in mRNA

app.name: cai
app.desc: Calculate codon adaptation index

app.name: chips
app.desc: Calculate Nc codon usage statistic

app.name: codcmp
app.desc: Codon usage table comparison

app.name: codcopy
app.desc: Copy and reformat a codon usage table

app.name: cusp
app.desc: Create a codon usage table from nucleotide sequence(s)

app.name: syco
app.desc: Draw synonymous codon usage statistic plot for a nucleotide sequence

app.name: banana
app.desc: Plot bending and curvature data for B-DNA

app.name: btwisted
app.desc: Calculate the twisting in a B-DNA sequence

app.name: chaos
app.desc: Draw a chaos game representation plot for a nucleotide sequence

app.name: compseq
app.desc: Calculate the composition of unique words in sequences

app.name: dan
app.desc: Calculate nucleic acid melting temperature

app.name: freak
app.desc: Generate residue/base frequency table or plot

app.name: isochore
app.desc: Plot isochores in DNA sequences

app.name: wordcount
app.desc: Count and extract unique words in molecular sequence(s)

app.name: cpgplot
app.desc: Identify and plot CpG islands in nucleotide sequence(s)

app.name: cpgreport
app.desc: Identify and report CpG-rich regions in nucleotide sequence(s)

app.name: geecee
app.desc: Calculate fractional GC content of nucleic acid sequences

app.name: newcpgreport
app.desc: Identify CpG islands in nucleotide sequence(s)

app.name: newcpgseek
app.desc: Identify and report CpG-rich regions in nucleotide sequence(s)

app.name: marscan
app.desc: Find matrix/scaffold recognition (MRS) signatures in DNA sequences

app.name: sirna
app.desc: Find siRNA duplexes in mRNA

app.name: trimest
app.desc: Remove poly-A tails from nucleotide sequences

app.name: checktrans

app.desc: Find and extract open reading frames (ORFs)

app.desc: Find matrix/scaffold recognition (MRS) signatures in DNA sequences

app.desc: Plot potential open reading frames in a nucleotide sequence

app.desc: Display a nucleotide sequence and translation in pretty format

app.desc: Display a DNA sequence with 6-frame translation and ORFs

app.name: syco
app.desc: Draw synonymous codon usage statistic plot for a nucleotide sequence

app.desc: Identify protein-coding regions using Fickett TESTCODE statistic

app.desc: Plot third base position variability in a nucleotide sequence

app.desc: Search for patterns in nucleotide sequences
